segments.text: That situation also locked in, so...
segments.original_text: インシュラルドクもありましたから

segments.text: From that flip, there's a slight momentum loss
segments.original_text: フリップからどこでちょっとブレーキがかかる

segments.text: Against the flip, it's obviously just one-sided dominance
segments.original_text: フリップに対してはもちろんトロッコの一方勝ち

full_text: That situation also locked in, so... From that flip, there's a slight momentum loss Against the flip, it's obviously just one-sided dominance
